smoke.detail: Box smoke on FTO-43 fixture: CNS_MPO=5.198 in [0,6], equals the sum of its six component desirabilities (D_MW 1.0 + D_cLogP 1.0 + D_cLogD 1.0 + D_HBD 0.833 + D_pKa 0.5 + D_TPSA 0.865). pytest tests/test_model_cns_mpo.py -m model: 4 passed (smoke + 3 sum-consistency cases), output validated against core.schemas.OutputRecord. rdkit 2026.03.3.

note: CNS MPO (Wager 2010/2016) six-property desirability rule, 0-6, higher=more CNS-desirable; lock box-solved (linux-64, rdkit 2026.03.3); pKa is F-13 shared placeholder feeding D(pKa)+cLogD; rough filter only (AUC 0.53), not a gate.
